caseStudy.problem: Engineers at Yungo couldn't find internal tool knowledge spread across PDFs, DOCX, and JSON files.
caseStudy.approach: Built a modular RAG system with semantic chunking, validation layers, and intent-aware retrieval. Added feedback loops to PostgreSQL for continuous improvement.

caseStudy.problem: ABB robot needed precise camera-to-robot coordinate transformation for autonomous pick-and-place in dynamic workspaces.
caseStudy.approach: Implemented hand-eye calibration using OpenCV's calibrateHandEye() with ArUco markers. Built pose-to-motion transformation pipeline for accurate object localization.

caseStudy.problem: Researchers and professionals needed to quickly extract insights from lengthy documents without reading everything.
caseStudy.approach: Built document parsing pipeline with PyMuPDF, implemented dynamic text chunking based on token limits, and designed prompt templates for coherent summaries.

caseStudy.problem: Need for accessible real-time object detection without complex setup or GPU requirements.
caseStudy.approach: Integrated YOLOv8 with OpenCV for detection, built Streamlit frontend with webcam API, implemented fallback to uploaded video for environments without camera access.

principles.title: Data First
principles.description: Start with data reality, not models. Understand what you have before choosing architecture.

principles.title: Boring Works
principles.description: Prefer reliable, well-understood architectures over trendy solutions.

principles.title: Measure First
principles.description: Measure retrieval quality before generation. Evaluation drives improvement.

principles.title: Build to Last
principles.description: Design for maintainability, not demos. Production systems need to evolve.
